name: AWS FinOps MCP Server
what_it_does: AWS FinOps MCP server enabling AI agents to perform cloud financial operations analysis — querying AWS cost and usage, identifying rightsizing opportunities, analyzing reserved instance coverage, detecting idle resources, generating cost optimization recommendations, and integrating comprehensive FinOps analysis into agent-driven cloud cost governance workflows.
use_cases: Identifying rightsizing opportunities for EC2 instances from cost optimization agents
Analyzing Reserved Instance and Savings Plan utilization from FinOps agents
Detecting idle and underutilized resources from resource audit agents
Generating cost optimization recommendations from cloud governance agents
Tracking cost anomalies and budget overruns from monitoring agents
Building comprehensive FinOps dashboards from reporting agents
not_for: Teams not using AWS (use Azure Cost Management or GCP Billing for those)
Real-time infrastructure changes (this is analysis-only, not remediation)
Teams using third-party FinOps tools like Cloudability or CloudHealth
best_when: An agent needs actionable AWS cost optimization insights — identifying waste, rightsizing opportunities, and savings plan optimization through automated FinOps analysis.
avoid_when: You need multi-cloud cost analysis or real-time cost alerts — this focuses on AWS analysis and optimization recommendations, not multi-cloud or alerting.

auth.notes: AWS IAM credentials. Requires read-only permissions across: Cost Explorer (ce:*), EC2 (ec2:Describe*), CloudWatch metrics, Trusted Advisor. IAM role recommended over static keys.

pricing.free_tier_limits: AWS API calls may incur costs: Cost Explorer $0.01/request; CloudWatch free tier limited
pricing.paid_tiers: Cost based on underlying AWS API usage
pricing.notes: Community MCP server is free. Underlying AWS API calls may incur costs (esp. Cost Explorer at $0.01/request). Trusted Advisor requires Business or Enterprise support plan for full recommendations.

performance.rate_limits: Per-service AWS API rate limits; Cost Explorer: $0.01/call

known_agent_gotchas: Requires broader IAM permissions across multiple AWS services (Cost Explorer, EC2, CloudWatch)
Trusted Advisor recommendations require Business/Enterprise support plan
Cost Explorer API charges $0.01/request — FinOps queries can quickly accumulate costs
Analysis data has 24-48 hour delay — recommendations based on historical data, not real-time
Community MCP server — analysis depth may vary; verify recommendations before acting
Right-sizing recommendations require instance type changes — not automated, just analysis
agent_readiness.security_notes: TLS via AWS SDK. Read-only IAM across Cost Explorer, EC2, CloudWatch, Trusted Advisor. SOC2, ISO27001 for underlying AWS. Community MCP server. Use read-only IAM role. Never grant remediation permissions to analysis-only agent.

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS via AWS SDK. Multi-service read-only IAM permissions. SOC2, ISO27001. Community MCP server. Use IAM role with minimal read-only access. Analysis only — no write permissions.
